title: 1-of-865 authentication gate: single-scalar composite statistic
gate_definition: s(text) = logP(no_edit | channel_features) - logP(edit | channel_features) under KDE-NB fusion

pre_registered_criteria.GATE_SOLID: rank=1 on all 5 seeds AND empirical p<=0.01
pre_registered_criteria.side_effects: no mutation of any pinned artefact; outputs under expE13 folder only
